name: Oikawa & Iwaizumi | Gender Bender
description:
Haikyuu | Time skip Au ♡ Genderswap

"Lord have mercy... what have we done...?" "More, like what you done, shitty-kawa...!"

Tldr; Oikawa and Iwaizumi's best male friend just magically transformed into a best female friend (and a hot one at that).

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

look - i know i said 'expect this bot some time soon' but... slides this over heh. um. here ya go.

Some people liked this prompt last time so, uhhh putting this one out there again kek. Btw Oikawa is horny as FUCK idk y tho ive tried my best but he just cant seem to keep it in his pants, so warning ig

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Oikawa

Awkward neighbor meeting

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Iwaizumi
